mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ORG_CODE (ORG_ID, CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE, ORG_CODE, PRIORITY) VALUES (#{orgId}, #{codeGroupId}, #{row.code}, #{row.orgCode}, NVL(#{row.priority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'))
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT oc.ORG_ID, o.ORG_NAME, oc.CODE_GROUP_ID, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME, oc.CODE, c.CODE_NAME, oc.ORG_CODE, oc.PRIORITY FROM FWK_ORG_CODE oc LEFT JOIN FWK_ORG o ON oc.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON oc.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON oc.CODE_GROUP_ID = c.CODE_GROUP_ID AND oc.CODE = c.CODE
ORDER BY oc.CODE_GROUP_ID, oc.CODE, oc.ORG_CODE ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}

SELECT c.CODE, c.CODE_NAME, oc.ORG_CODE, oc.PRIORITY, CASE WHEN oc.ORG_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EXISTING_MAPPING FROM FWK_CODE c LEFT JOIN FWK_ORG_CODE oc ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = oc.CODE_GROUP_ID AND c.CODE = oc.CODE AND oc.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE c.CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CODE

SELECT oc.ORG_ID AS orgId, o.ORG_NAME AS orgName, oc.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName, oc.CODE AS code, c.CODE_NAME AS codeName, oc.ORG_CODE AS orgCode, oc.PRIORITY AS priority FROM FWK_ORG_CODE oc LEFT JOIN FWK_ORG o ON oc.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON oc.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON oc.CODE_GROUP_ID = c.CODE_GROUP_ID AND oc.CODE = c.CODE
ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}
